title: Adding Slack automation to notify updates on subtasks
excerpt: I would like to request a Slack automation to nofify a Slack channel when there is an update to a SUBTASK. Right now there is only an automation to update the TASK.

posts.author: LDillon1980 (Luke Dillon)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to request a Slack automation to nofify a Slack channel when there is an update to a SUBTASK. Right now there is only an automation to update the TASK.

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Luke, we recently launched an app called Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com that let’s you do exactly that (and more)! Request you to kindly give it a try

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: arubinomunoz (Amalia Rubino @Upscale (part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml: Our app is free for up to 2 users and if you have more than 2 users in your account, pricing is based on the number of seats in your account. We offer a 2-week free trial so you can test it out and see how it fits your workflow. We’d love for you to give it a try—sounds like it could be a game-changer for managing all those subtasks!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LDillon1980

we’d set up a custom Slack automation that triggers whenever subtask gets updated. Since most native automation tools focus on tasks, we can use Make.com (or a similar integration platform) to monitor subtask changes and send real-time notifications to a designated Slack channel.

  • Detect updates on subtasks (status, assignee, due date, etc.)
  • Format a clear Slack message with relevant details
  • Tag the right team members automatically for quick action
